description: Show converted amounts directly on transaction rows in the selected base currency (with original amount context).

userStories.title: Add row-level converted amount model to transactions state
userStories.description: As a developer, I want transaction row UI state to carry both original and converted amount fields so rendering can show selected base currency without losing source value context.
acceptanceCriteria: Transaction row state includes original amount+currency and optional converted amount+currency
Conversion availability flag exists per row (available/unavailable) to avoid silent wrong formatting
No crash when rate is missing; row falls back to source amount
CI checks for this story commit pass on GitHub Actions
userStories.notes: Work in presentation:transactions state models and mappers. Keep backward compatibility for existing list item composables until final UI story.

userStories.title: Compute per-transaction conversion in TransactionListViewModel
userStories.description: As a user, I want each transaction row to show value in my selected base currency so that list-level reading is consistent with summary cards.
acceptanceCriteria: When base currency differs from source currency, each row computes converted amount using latest available rate
When base currency matches source currency, converted amount is not redundantly shown
When rate is unavailable, row clearly shows original amount and marks conversion unavailable
ViewModel logic is deterministic and does not introduce extra recomposition loops
CI checks for this story commit pass on GitHub Actions
userStories.notes: Reuse existing ConvertAmountUseCase and base currency preference flow already used for overview totals. Avoid database schema changes.

userStories.title: Render transaction rows with converted + original value presentation
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see converted value on each transaction row and still understand original currency source.
acceptanceCriteria: Transaction row primary amount reflects selected base currency when conversion is available
Row also shows original source amount/currency in secondary text when conversion is applied
Formatting and sign conventions stay correct for income/expense
UI remains readable for long numbers and does not overlap existing metadata
CI checks for this story commit pass on GitHub Actions
userStories.notes: Keep UI minimal and consistent with current list style. Do not redesign card layout; only add required secondary amount line/label.

userStories.title: Add tests for row-level currency conversion behavior
userStories.description: As a developer, I want test coverage for per-row conversion scenarios so future changes do not break display currency logic.
acceptanceCriteria: ViewModel tests cover: same-currency path, conversion path, and missing-rate fallback
Tests validate both displayed converted amount and original amount context fields
Tests validate correct sign handling for income and expense rows
CI checks for this story commit pass on GitHub Actions
userStories.notes: Prefer existing TransactionListViewModelTest style with fake repos and coroutine test dispatcher.
